title: cocculus elegans
intro: Cocculus elegans, also known as the Moonseed or Australian Moonseed, is a plant species native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues, muscle spasms, and menstrual cramps. The health benefits associated with Cocculus elegans include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Cocculus elegans often involve drying and powdering the plant's seeds, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures for various health benefits.
